evidence: Synchronous File System calls (fs.readFileSync) inside the tools registry loop.
whyUseful: Node.js is single-threaded; synchronous I/O operations block the entire event loop, preventing the server from handling incoming requests.
suggestedImprovement: Refactor all synchronous filesystem operations to use the fs.promises API or asynchronous callback patterns.

topic: Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) in Monolithic Architectures
source: Clean Architecture by Robert C. Martin
evidence: src/App.tsx exceeding 2200 lines and server/router.ts exceeding 800 lines.
whyUseful: Excessive file length indicates poor modularization, increasing technical debt, cognitive load, and risk of regression during simple refactors.
suggestedImprovement: Implement component composition patterns and migrate router logic into feature-based controller modules.
